title: Syconn's Super Hero Mod
description: Adds Super Hero's and Gadgets to Minecraft
body:
Have you ever wanted to be a superhero in Minecraft? Well, this is the mod for you. Have you wanted to fly like Iron Man? Shoot Repulsor beats. Thors Hammer of lightning. Caps Super Strength.

# Current Features
This mod allows you to propel yourself through the sky by pressing and holding SPACE when wearing Iron Man's Mark 42 armor. Throw Thor's hammer by Holding Shift + Right Mouse button similar to the trident that when it hits an enemy, block, or player strikes them with a lightning bolt from the heavens above. Or do you want to fly like Thor? Well just Hold Right Click and look where you want to go and release the button to propel yourself around the world.

Look at Current Textures:
![Mark 42 Armor Holding Mjolnir](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IUKDvtKG/images/53470938212664606dee49e525782d6930de66fe.png)

## Upcoming Features
Planned is the ability to shoot pure beams of energy while wearing the Iron Man Suit. Plus more with other inspirations and ideas. 

## Dowloading
If using the Fabric Version make sure to also download the Fabric API. This mod is both Client and Server side when playing online.
